name: guilherme ferreira
bio: Software Engineering student at UMinho. Writing high-performance systems, building scalable architectures, and diving deep into low-level programming.
currently: reading the Tiger Book (Modern Compiler Implementation) and using Zig to implement the Tiger language
networking and learning from experienced engineers in the systems industry
daily-driving and tweaking NixOS, with the goal of contributing back to the community

experience.title: Frontend Web Developer (Intern)
experience.desc: Developed a scalable frontend architecture for a real-world dashboard in an Agile team of 5.

experience.title: Co-Director (Social & Partnerships) & Tech Contributor
experience.desc: Co-directed a team to secure partnerships and execute events for an 800+ student community. Contributed to core OSS tools (CAOS, Pombo) and engineered the ENEI event platform. Mentored participants in debugging and web dev at BugsByte.

experience.title: Champion & Co-Organizer
experience.desc: Directing a community of 100+ mentors and orchestrated a technical summer camp for 30 participants, overseeing curriculum and operations.

projects.name: FlyData
projects.desc: High-performance in-memory database engine. Optimized parsing via SIMD, concurrency, branchless programming, and memory mapping. Achieved 20/20.

projects.name: LiveVue Core & Tooling
projects.desc: Contributed to the live_vue library and engineered a dedicated VS Code extension for sigil highlighting to improve developer experience.

projects.name: Pearl
projects.desc: Official ENEI event platform for 600+ attendees. Developed device-agnostic, adaptive interfaces focusing on high reliability and micro-interactions.

projects.name: CeSIUM OSS Ecosystem
projects.desc: Maintained and contributed to open-source tools for UMinho students, including Pombo (Atlas & Astra) and the CAOS infrastructure.

goals: contribute to hardcore open-source (aiming for the Linux kernel)
master Zig, C & Elixir while exploring Rust/Go/C3
fool around more with Haskell (see my Immutable Towers game)
